title: What Is a Video Sales Letter, Why It Works, and What to Look for When Hiring
excerpt: A Video Sales Letter is one of the most powerful pieces of video content an organization can produce. Here's what it is, when it works, and what makes First Sight Films the right choice.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Brand story video production in St. Augustine

content.caption: The most effective VSLs don't sound like sales pitches — they sound like conversations
